title: Directional Skew Dashboard
summary: get_directional_skew() added to learning.py — calculates long/short ratio over rolling 48h and 7d windows, with regime-aware alerts (e.g. heavy long in BEAR_TRENDING triggers warning). Dashboard displays skew bar, ratio, and alert panel in real time. Shipped in Phase A commit (620e75d).
approach: New get_directional_skew(window_hours, regime) and get_directional_skew_multi() in learning.py. Dashboard reads skew data and renders: skew-bar (visual slider), skew-val (numeric), skew-detail (L/S counts), skew-alert (regime mismatch warning). Diagnostic only — not fed back into agent prompts.
